Contact-level engagement

Every recipient across Case Study 1 through 5. All figures are human opens and human clicks only — bot and email-security-scanner activity is excluded for every case study. "Sweet Spot" = opened 1–2 times with no click yet. Drip columns show that contact's company-level results from the 13-state drip campaign, when matched by company name.

Drip campaign — company engagement

Open and click totals per company from the 13-state drip campaign. Sort by clicks to find your hottest accounts, or by opens to find companies worth a follow-up touch.
